label: PayPal Lockout
subject: Urgent: Verify Your Account Immediately
body:
Dear Customer,

Your account has been limited. Please verify your login immediately to avoid suspension.

Click here now:
http://192.168.1.44/login
https://bit.ly/secure-payal-check

Regards,
PayPal Support

label: Microsoft Reset
subject: Action Required: Reset your password now
body:
Dear user,

We detected unusual activity on your Microsoft 365 account. Reset your password immediately to secure your mailbox.

Verify account:
https://tinyurl.com/m365-secure-reset

Security Team

label: Vendor Invoice
subject: Updated invoice for March services
body:
Hi Lauger,

Attached is the updated invoice for March services. Let me know if you want us to resend the PDF through the client portal.

Thanks,
Mila
